name: Hsun Chi (Tea Smoked Chicken)
recipeIngredient: ½ cup China black tea leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the rice wine, salt, and crushed Szechwan peppercorns.
2. Cut scallions into 2-inch long pieces and flatten with flat side of cleaver. Flatten gingerroot similarly with cleaver.
3. Add scallions and gingerroot to the bowl with the marinade.
4. Add the chicken and rub it well with the marinade. Let marinate overnight, covered and chilled.
5. Line the bottom and lid of a wok with heavy-duty foil.
6. In a small bowl, combine tea leaves and brown sugar until well mixed.
7. Place mixture in the bottom of the wok, arranging a rack 2-inches above it.
8. Transfer marinated chicken to the rack in the wok, breast side up.
9. Heat wok over medium-high heat for 5-6 minutes or until it begins to smoke.
10. Smoke the chicken, covered, for 6 minutes.
11. Turn chicken breast side down and continue smoking for another 6 minutes.
12. Remove wok from heat and let stand, covered, for 15 minutes.
13. Transfer chicken to a cutting board, brush with oil, and cut into serving pieces.
